name: Streets of New Capenna

draft.notes: 10 commons + 3 uncommons + 1 rare + 1 land + ad card. If a foil appears it comes after the rare and displaces a common (becomes 9 commons). The ad/marketing card may carry a token or emblem; punch cards appear ~1 in 8 packs on a separate sheet.

statedRates: Foil 1:45 cards. Half of packs have 3 A uncommons, half have 3 B uncommons. Punch cards ~1 in 8 packs.
sourceNotes: Large set, normal size for era. Four variations of each basic land. Printed in USA and Belgium (Japanese existence uncertain); US printing modeled. 36 packs per box. Marketing cards mostly feature tokens/emblems; an MTG Arena ad card also appears.
